top_signals.title: FedEx Freight embarks on journey as standalone LTL carrier
top_signals.summary:
The nation’s largest less-than-truckload carrier, FedEx Freight, began trading as a standalone company on Monday.

The post FedEx Freight embarks on journey as standalone LTL carrier appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
